step_rationale: Ketone body; energetic biomarker of cardiac metabolism during acute ischemia.
mechanism: 3-Hydroxybutyrate reflects myocardial metabolic stress and energy depletion during acute coronary syndrome.

references.title: Distinct microbial and metabolic shifts characterize acute coronary syndrome and recovery.
NMR plasma metabolomics study of patients overcoming acute myocardial infarction: in the first 12 h after onset of chest pain with statistical discrimination towards metabolomic biomarkers.
